recipes.name: Lemon Herb Chickpea Bowl
recipes.description: Bright, protein-rich bowl with chickpeas, quinoa, and citrus herbs.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add quinoa, chickpeas, tomatoes, and cucumber; toss well.
Fold in chopped parsley and adjust seasoning.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

recipes.name: Peach Crumble
ingredients: 12-14 peaches - sliced or 3-16oz bags frozen peach slices
instructions: 1. Add peaches to a large skillet or pot over medium heat.
2. Once they start releasing juice add maple syrup cinnamon lemon juice and salt.
3. Cook 5–7 minutes stirring occasionally until glossy and warm.
4. Taste and adjust sweetness or cinnamon.
1. Heat a large skillet over medium.
2. Add oats + coconut oil + maple syrup + cinnamon + salt.
3. Stir 3–5 minutes until lightly toasted and clumpy.
stir them in during the last minute.
5. Remove from heat so it doesn’t burn.
